name: trailcurrent-playbill-workspace
description: TrailCurrent Playbill — desktop entertainment app + Radxa Q6A image build (workspace root, JavaScript only, no TypeScript).

scripts.build: npm run embed-creds && npm run build --workspace app
scripts.start: npm run embed-creds && npm run start --workspace app
scripts.dist: npm run embed-creds && npm run dist --workspace app
